description: Analysis specification for identifying and analyzing dental clinics in Spain

categories.label: Dental Clinic
categories.description: Business is a dental clinic or dental practice providing dental care services

categories.label: Not a Dental Clinic
categories.description: Business is healthcare-related but not a dental clinic (e.g., hospital, medical clinic, pharmacy, dental supplier)

categories.label: Unrelated Business
categories.description: Business is completely unrelated to dental care or healthcare

business_name.description: Official name of the dental clinic or business

address.description: Full street address or clinic location

questions.question: Is this a dental clinic or dental practice that provides dental care services to patients? Answer: Yes, No, or Unknown
Is this dental clinic part of a larger group or chain of dental clinics? Look for evidence of multiple locations, franchise relationships, or corporate ownership. Answer: Yes, No, or Unknown

If this dental clinic is part of a group, how many dental clinics does the group have? Provide a specific number if stated, a range if approximate (e.g., '10-15', '50+'), or 'no evidence' if not part of a group or information is not available.
